name: Saucy Sardine
recipeIngredient: 8 each Sardine Fillets; Boneless and Skinned
1 tablespoon Green Onion; Chopped (use both the green and white parts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the skinned sardine fillets with a fork.
2. Blend in the sour cream and mayonnaise until well combined.
3. Add the lemon juice, chopped green onion, and parsley, then blend again to ensure all ingredients are thoroughly mixed.
4. Cover and chill. Makes about 1 1/2 cups of dip. Suggested dippers include broccoli, cabbage, cherry tomatoes, carrots, pita triangles, cocktail rye bread, and water crackers.
